# JDemetra+ History {.unnumbered #g-jd-hist}

## In this chapter

We try to cast some light at history of the project and be grateful to people who contributed...

If you end up reading this and have elements to share (anecdotes, pictures, articles....), please don't hesitate to write in. Consider also writing a guest blog post [here](https://jdemetra-universe-blog.netlify.app/).


## Articles 

- a paper from [Insee](Articles/History JD+ (Insee).pdf)
